name: Mitek Systems
description: Mitek Systems pioneered mobile ID capture and provides document verification, biometric authentication and fraud detection APIs used by banks, lenders and payment providers worldwide.

seo.title: Mitek Systems — KYC / KYB / AML API
seo.meta_description: Mitek Systems: Mitek Systems pioneered mobile ID capture and provides document verification, biometric authentication and fraud detection APIs used by banks, le

when_to_use: Mobile ID document capture SDK for bank KYC onboarding
Document authentication for insurance claims verification
Face match biometrics for financial account re-authentication
Liveness detection SDK for fraud-resistant digital onboarding
Check fraud detection via MiSnap image quality analysis

pros: Pioneer in mobile document capture technology
Deep bank and lender customer base
Combines docs, biometrics and fraud signals
Recent HooYu acquisition widens the stack
cons: Overlap between HooYu and core Mitek products
review.verdict: Established document-capture and fraud vendor with M&A baggage; sensible for big banks, not startups.
review.best_for: Banks, lenders and payment providers needing mature mobile capture and fraud stacks at scale
review.not_for: Startups that want clean, unified APIs and fast iteration rather than legacy enterprise tooling
